title: Test
details: This extra - large bulletin board poster storage bag (30" x 24") is a must - have for teachers and moms to organize classroom and art supplies. Made of heavy - duty PVC (body) and nylon (handles & edges), it’s durable for carrying classroom items. The transparent PVC design enables easy organization and quick access to contents, while the velcro closure keeps things secure. It has an A4 - sized middle pocket (14" x 10") for small stuff. Ideal for storing large posters, bulletin board sheets, teaching materials, artworks, and oversized art items. Perfect for organizing classroom projects, exhibit boards, and display materials, making storage and transport of big items a breeze.
